Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in cases that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that include both Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER compared to the total time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in the same process variant
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION occurs

Name: Minimum time it takes the Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to be done in successful variants (ending in Payment Handled) versus variants that include a rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and the end of the case

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants where Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs later
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants that do not contain any rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in high-frequency successful variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that skip the PRE_APPROVER role entirely
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER does not occur

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Request Payment in variants that avoid any rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Time of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER when the case originates from a resubmission following Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION occurs

Name: Average time it takes Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in variants that never involve PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants with no rejections
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER compared to the time for Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in overlapping or alternative approval paths
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time until Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER is performed in cases that previously experienced a rejection by any actor other than PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and the next activity in variants that successfully complete without involving PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Payment Handled'
